meditations.title: Quick Calm - 5 Minutes
meditations.description: A brief guided meditation to center yourself and reduce immediate stress. Perfect for study breaks.

meditations.title: Focus Meditation - 10 Minutes
meditations.description: Enhance your concentration and mental clarity before important study sessions or exams.

meditations.title: Stress Relief - 10 Minutes
meditations.description: Release tension and anxiety with this calming guided meditation designed for students.

meditations.title: Deep Relaxation - 15 Minutes
meditations.description: A comprehensive meditation session for deep relaxation and mental rejuvenation.

meditations.title: Morning Energy - 10 Minutes
meditations.description: Start your day with positive energy and mental clarity. Perfect for morning study sessions.

meditations.title: Sleep Preparation - 15 Minutes
meditations.description: Wind down after a long day of studying. Prepare your mind and body for restful sleep.

meditations.title: Exam Anxiety Relief - 10 Minutes
meditations.description: Specifically designed to calm pre-exam nerves and boost confidence.

meditations.title: Body Scan - 15 Minutes
meditations.description: Release physical tension from long study sessions with this progressive body scan meditation.

meditations.title: Mindful Breathing - 5 Minutes
meditations.description: Simple breathing exercises to quickly center yourself and regain focus.

meditations.title: Confidence Boost - 10 Minutes
meditations.description: Build self-confidence and positive self-image for academic success.
